message:
Add series_describe conformance coverage (FP-P2D-117)

Add SeriesDescribe operation to the conformance harness with fixtures for:
- Basic describe with count, mean, std, min, percentiles, max
- Describe with null values (excluded from stats)
- Single value edge case (std=0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
